title: Edinburgh Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Edinburgh, with a Z-Score of -3.17. This event has been classified as CRITICAL with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Edinburgh are extremely cold, with a significant impact on the city's infrastructure. 
 The Heating Degree Days (HDD) value is 12.1 GG, indicating a high demand for heating. 
 The relative humidity is 70% and the wind speed is 10.1 km/h, making the cold even more unbearable.
conclusion: Monitor the situation closely and take necessary precautions to ensure public safety.
